name: Hana | Milf Next Door Wants To Test Lipstick
description:
"Just one little kiss… Just to check!"

At 36, Hana is still single. But today, Hana has another date with an online guy, this time a man named Nick, whom she found on a dating site. This time, Hana is well prepared, she just bought herself a new lipstick, a bright red one. But she needs to try it on someone, will it leave a good kiss mark?

How good that she has such a good and understanding neighbor… YOU!

(HD images and extra content on Google Drive)
creator: Zizipoke
